THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ANTHONY CHAN, ALEX CHEN AND CALVIN WAN, AS CONSERVATORS OF THE ESTATE OF ALVINA CHAN, CONSERVATEE, SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT ON THEIR CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT CHIU WAH CHU, AKA MATTHEW CHU, FOR THE SUMS OF $26,671.98 FOR COMPENSATORY DAMAGES FOR FRAUD ON THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION; $50,029.66 FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND INVESTIGATION FEES ON THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION; $90,000.00 FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FOR FRAUD ON THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION. COSTS AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE FIXED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANTHONY CHAN, AS TRUSTEE FOR SHU-KAI CHAN AND KWOK WAI CHUN, SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT CHU WAH CHU, AKA MATTHUEW CHU, FOR $65,658.35 FOR COMPENSATORY DAMAGES FOR FRAUD ON THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. COSTS AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE FIXED. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ANTHONY CHAN, ALEX CHEN AND CALVIN WAN, SHALL RECOVER NOTHING ON THEIR CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST KWAN TSOI, AKA JOYCE KWAN TSOI.
